category.scope_note: Comparison of China domestic refrigerator export documentation versus Indonesia SNI and ministry requirements for market access, safety, energy use, refrigerant, and importer control.

target_market_label.zh: 印度尼西亚（SNI / 工业部）

title.zh: 中国电冰箱进入印度尼西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電冰箱進入印尼：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China-to-Indonesia refrigerator market access requirements, covering mandatory SNI certification, LSPro SPPT-SNI workflow, energy-label and MEPS obligations, safety standard divergence, refrigerant expectations, and importer documentation controls.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱进入印度尼西亚对比，覆盖强制性SNI认证、LSPro SPPT-SNI流程、节能标识与最小能效水平、与安全标准差异、制冷剂要求和进口商文件控制。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱進入印尼對比，涵蓋強制性SNI認證、LSPro SPPT-SNI流程、節能標籤與最小能效水平、與安全標準差異、製冷劑要求和進口商文件控制。

disclaimer.en: This page is for informational use only. It is not certification, legal, customs, or customs-duty advice. Exporters and importers should verify current Indonesian regulations, ports procedures, and commercial documents with qualified professionals before shipment, customs clearance, and sale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅供信息用途，不构成认证、法律、海关或税务建议。出口商和进口商应在出运、清关和销售前，先与合资格专业人员核验现行印度尼西亚法规、港口程序和商业文件。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅供資訊用途，不構成認證、法律、海關或稅務建議。出口商和進口商應在出運、清關和銷售前，先與合資格專業人員核驗現行印尼法規、港口程序和商業文件。

answer_first.en: For refrigerators from China to Indonesia, assume a dual control path: mandatory Indonesian SNI route with importer-linked market-access documents, and separate energy and safety evidence in the Indonesia format. LSPro-processed SNI marking, ESDM label compliance, and the in-country importer requirement are typically the highest-friction points because China CCC documents and domestic labels do not complete Indonesian import readiness by themselves.
answer_first.zh: 中国电冰箱出口到印尼通常要走双路径：一是印度尼西亚强制的SNI进口准入，二是按印尼格式重建能源和安全证据。由于印尼要求LSPro处理的SNI标识、ESDM节能标签合规以及本地进口商责任，单凭中国CCC文件和国内标签通常不足以完成印尼进口合规。
answer_first.zht: 中國電冰箱出口到印尼通常要走雙路徑：一是印尼強制的SNI進口准入，二是按印尼格式重建能源和安全證據。由於印尼要求LSPro處理的SNI標誌、ESDM節能標籤合規以及在地進口商責任，單憑中國CCC文件和國內標籤通常不足以完成印尼進口合規。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Source-linked updates only. Keep verified=false unless formally validated and timestamped by a qualified reviewer.
